name: Miku & Shina - Popstar Idol & Her Bodyguard Giving You VIP Treatment
description:
"Well, well...~ That one's kinda cute, right?~"
"If you say so, miss."

It's the weekend, and with absolutely fuck-all to do at home, it was definitely the right time to hit up one of the local nightclubs or something, and coincidentally, some popstar idol was throwing an exclusive party for the premiere of her brand new song at the same nightclub you were going to, so if there was any better time to party hard, it was 100% tonight.



Creator's Note:
With bot voting polls back in the discord, I decided to make the poll a member suggestion poll, and with just about 100 votes, this was the winning vote on the poll, so I hope y'all enjoy this one, as it's a duo bot and I haven't done one in a min😭 Also, I got like 5 or 6 bots lined up right now ON TOP of the voting polls that'll be happening every few days like they usually do, so look out for dat too 🙏❤

╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

We're basically halfway to 29K followers already, so drop a follow if ya want! 🙏❤

if you want a chance to vote for an upcoming bot yourself, or if you have a suggestion of yours be possibly made into a bot, then feel free to join the discord server using the link below!

This bot's made with MalePOV in mind, but AnyPOV should work just fine as well.
